name: Jumbles
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the butter until very light.
2. Add the sugar and beat well.
3. Incorporate the egg whites, beating to a froth.
4. Continue mixing until smooth.
5. Gradually add the flour, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, caraway seeds, and rosewater; mix until smooth.
6. Refrigerate until firm.
7. Dust hands and work surface with flour.
8. Roll out dough and cut into equal portions.
9. Form each portion into round rolls and then into rings by joining the ends.
10. Place jumbles in lightly buttered tin pans, ensuring they don't touch.
11. Bake at 375°F for about 8-10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
12. Allow to cool before dusting with sugar.
